bids.reasoning: At the start of the negotiation (t = 0.0), I aim for maximizing my utility, as there is no time pressure. Thus, I'll propose a bid with the highest utility values for each issue according to my preference context. Since there is no offer history or message history to analyze, I will not make any concessions at this point and will stick to my optimal bid.
